message:
feat(ready): exclude in_progress issues from ready output

The `br ready` command now shows only open issues that are unblocked, not
deferred, not pinned, and not ephemeral. Previously it included both open
and in_progress statuses, which was misleading since in_progress issues
are already being worked on and should not appear as "ready to pick up."

Changes:
- Update idx_issues_ready partial index to filter on status='open' only
- Bump schema version to 4 with migration to recreate the index
- Update CLI help text, agent guide, and doc comments to say "open"
- Add e2e test asserting in_progress issues are excluded
- Fix storage_ready unit test to match new semantics
- Update CLI help snapshot

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ This project uses [beads_rust](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust)
 ### Essential Commands
 
 ```bash
-# View ready issues (unblocked, not deferred)
+# View ready issues (open, unblocked, not deferred)
 br ready              # or: bd ready
 
 # List and search
@@ -65,7 +65,7 @@ br sync --status      # Check sync status
 
 ### Key Concepts
 
-- **Dependencies**: Issues can block other issues. `br ready` shows only unblocked work.
+- **Dependencies**: Issues can block other issues. `br ready` shows only open, unblocked work.
 - **Priority**: P0=critical, P1=high, P2=medium, P3=low, P4=backlog (use numbers 0-4, not words)
 - **Types**: task, bug, feature, epic, chore, docs, question
 - **Blocking**: `br dep add <issue> <depends-on>` to add dependencies

@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ Commands:
   close        Close an issue
   reopen       Reopen an issue
   delete       Delete an issue (creates tombstone)
-  ready        List ready issues (unblocked, not deferred)
+  ready        List ready issues (open, unblocked, not deferred)
   blocked      List blocked issues
   search       Search issues
   dep          Manage dependencies
